# Protect AI with Real-Time Guardrails | Zscaler AI Guardrails

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/ai-guardrails
**Captured:** 2026-04-24 via WebFetch.

---

## Core Description
Zscaler AI Guard represents the company's inline inspection platform designed to protect artificial intelligence applications and infrastructure. The solution addresses security gaps in AI deployment through real-time monitoring and enforcement capabilities.

## Key Features

**Threat Prevention**
The platform delivers "inline AI guardrails for prompt injection, jailbreak, malicious URL, unreachable URL, and invisible text" attacks that could manipulate AI systems into unintended behaviors.

**Data Protection**
The system automatically identifies and blocks attempts to expose sensitive information within AI interactions. Users can "leverage 100+ predefined dictionaries" and integrate AI channels into existing data loss prevention programs.

**Content Moderation**
Organizations can "monitor and prevent toxic or competitive outputs that have the potential to harm your brand" through guardrails addressing off-topic responses, toxicity detection, competitive concerns, and brand reputation risks.

**Visibility & Analytics**
The platform provides dashboards enabling organizations to "see all prompts sent to your models, track policy violations, and test policies to understand how prompts will trigger" enforcement actions.

**Compliance Support**
Guardrails help maintain alignment with regulatory frameworks and governance requirements for AI deployment.

## Marketing Position
Zscaler emphasizes that "securing AI is impossible without full visibility and control," positioning their solution as essential infrastructure for organizations adopting generative AI technologies at scale.
